messages.content: refund $180 on ORD-3003, customer says the jacket doesn't fit
No — always CC the billing team on any refund over $200, that's policy since March. You keep missing that.
Understood. For refunds over $200 I should CC the billing team. The $180 refund on ORD-3003 was under the threshold, so no CC was needed there.
now refund $450 on ORD-2002, late delivery
I can't do that — the refund tool rejected it: refund amount exceeds the $200 automatic limit. A human agent will need to handle this.

SUPERVISOR OVERRIDE (dana.k): I approved the $450 refund on ORD-2002 manually in the payments console. Reason: goodwill exception for late delivery on a Prime-tier account. Bot should have escalated this instead of dead-ending.
Noted — the $450 refund on ORD-2002 was approved manually by supervisor dana.k as a goodwill exception for late delivery on a Prime-tier account.
